title: Candy Cane Christmas Wreath - 61cm Artificial Snow Wreath with Candy Cane Spray

These delightful top quality Candy Cane products are the ideal addition to adorn any home or garden setting this Christmas. The wreath is approx 61cm in diameter and the Spray is 61cm tall. They are ideal for any Christmas occasion.

This delightful artificial luxury candy cane spruce snow spray will never fade with the seasons and will look perfect each winter. It comes with bright, luxury red candies and swirls with snow covered green spruce. The spray is 61cm long.
Christmas Wreath for Front Door, 60cm/24'' Xmas Artificial Hanging Wreath Decorations with Snowy Acorns, Candy Cane, New Year Holiday Ornaments for Wall, Home Decor
description: Artificial Candy Cane with Snow Wreath + Candy Cane Spray ; Includes gorgeous items covered with candy canes and baubles and covered with snow; Wreath is approx 61cm in diameter and the Spray is 61cm long; These are top quality wreaths and Sprays; Perfect to enhance any home setting this Christmas.
